keyEvents.text: First Half begins.
Delay in match because of an injury Moisés Caicedo (Ecuador).
Delay over. They are ready to continue.
Delay in match for a drinks break.
Delay in match for a drinks break.
Delay over. They are ready to continue.
Delay over. They are ready to continue.
Seko Fofana (Côte d'Ivoire) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Franck Kessie (Côte d'Ivoire) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Guéla Doué (Côte d'Ivoire) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Substitution, Ecuador. Nilson Angulo replaces Alan Minda.
Substitution, Côte d'Ivoire. Ange-Yoan Bonny replaces Elye Wahi.
Substitution, Côte d'Ivoire. Amad Diallo replaces Bazoumana Touré.
Substitution, Ecuador. Jackson Porozo replaces Alan Franco.
Substitution, Ecuador. Ángelo Preciado replaces John Yeboah.
Delay in match for a drinks break.
Delay over. They are ready to continue.
Jackson Porozo (Ecuador) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Substitution, Côte d'Ivoire. Ibrahim Sangaré replaces Seko Fofana.
Substitution, Côte d'Ivoire. Christ Inao Oulaï replaces Nicolas Pépé.
Substitution, Ecuador. Kevin Rodríguez replaces Enner Valencia.
Delay in match because of an injury Joel Ordóñez (Ecuador).
Delay over. They are ready to continue.
Substitution, Côte d'Ivoire. Odilon Kossounou replaces Guéla Doué.
Goal! Côte d'Ivoire 1, Ecuador 0. Amad Diallo (Côte d'Ivoire) left footed shot from the centre of the box to the bottom left corner. Assisted by Wilfried Singo.
Second Half ends, Côte d'Ivoire 1, Ecuador 0.
